login.title: Sign in
login.rate_limited: Too many attempts — try again later
login.setup_hint: First run: create the administrator account for this panel.

dashboard.offline_banner: Connection to the controller lost — the pool keeps running autonomously on the device.
dashboard.sim_banner: Simulator mode — no real hardware connected.

mode_hint.off: Pump stays off (frost protection still active)
mode_hint.force_on: Run the pump now with a timeout
mode_hint.boost: Heat regardless of the time window

control.title: Control
control.run_hint: Runs the pump with a hard timeout, then returns to the previous mode.
control.reset_hint: Lockouts need a manual reset after the cause is fixed.
control.estop_hint: Sets mode to Off and forces the relay open.
control.estop_confirm2: Really trigger the emergency stop now?
control.calibrate_hint: Runs the pump briefly and stores its nominal power draw for dry-run detection.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pending_hint: Values marked “pending” are not yet confirmed by the controller.
settings.saved_confirmed: Saved and confirmed by the controller

dt_start.label: Start ΔT
dt_start.help: Start heating when the mat is this much warmer than the water.

dt_stop.label: Stop ΔT
dt_stop.help: Stop heating when the difference falls to this value.

target_water_max.label: Target water temperature
target_water_max.help: Heating stops when the water reaches this temperature.

water_hyst.label: Restart hysteresis
water_hyst.help: Heating may only restart once the water is this much below the target.

absolute_water_max.label: Absolute water limit
absolute_water_max.help: Hard limit for any heat-driven pumping, including boost and mat cooling.

window_start_min.label: Heating window start
window_start_min.help: Earliest time of day for heating.

window_end_min.label: Heating window end
window_end_min.help: Latest time of day for heating.

min_run_s.label: Minimum runtime
min_run_s.help: Once started, the pump keeps running at least this long (protects the motor).

min_pause_s.label: Minimum pause
min_pause_s.help: After stopping, wait at least this long before restarting.

filt_target_s.label: Daily filtration target
filt_target_s.help: Total pump runtime per day. Heating runtime counts toward it.

filt_check_min.label: Deficit check time
filt_check_min.help: From this time on, missing runtime is made up automatically.

filt_block_max_s.label: Max block length
filt_block_max_s.help: Deficit runs are split into blocks of at most this length.

day_reset_min.label: Daily counter reset
day_reset_min.help: Time of day when the runtime counters reset.

mat_overtemp_limit.label: Mat overtemp limit
mat_overtemp_limit.help: Above this mat temperature the overtemperature response triggers.

mat_overtemp_action.label: Overtemp response
mat_overtemp_action.help: circulate = pump water to cool the mat and harvest heat; alert_only = notify; lockout = block pump until manual reset.

pump_power_nominal.label: Nominal pump power
pump_power_nominal.help: Measured normal power draw. 0 disables dry-run/overload detection. Use calibration on the Control page.

pump_power_min_pct.label: Dry-run threshold
pump_power_min_pct.help: Below this percentage of nominal power the pump is considered running dry.

pump_power_max_pct.label: Overload threshold
pump_power_max_pct.help: Above this percentage of nominal power the pump is considered blocked/overloaded.

no_power_threshold_w.label: No-power threshold
no_power_threshold_w.help: Below this power the pump is considered electrically dead (breaker tripped, relay failed).

power_grace_s.label: Detection grace time
power_grace_s.help: The power anomaly must persist this long before a fault triggers.

start_ignore_s.label: Start-up ignore time
start_ignore_s.help: Power readings are ignored this long after each pump start (inrush).

power_fault_action.label: Power fault response
power_fault_action.help: lockout = stay off until manual reset; retry = automatic retries with backoff, then lockout.

retry_max.label: Max retries
retry_max.help: Automatic restart attempts before locking out.

retry_backoff_s.label: Retry backoff
retry_backoff_s.help: Wait time before an automatic retry.

pol_sensor_fail_water.label: Water sensor failure policy
pol_sensor_fail_water.help: safe_off = pump off (safest for the pump); fallback_schedule = timed circulation (safest for water quality); continue_mat_only = heat using an assumed water temperature.

pol_sensor_fail_mat.label: Mat sensor failure policy
pol_sensor_fail_mat.help: Response when both mat probes fail.

pol_sensor_fail_air.label: Air sensor failure policy
pol_sensor_fail_air.help: warn_only keeps control running; frost protection then has no air reading.

fallback_start_min.label: Fallback window start
fallback_start_min.help: Fallback runs only happen inside this window.

fault_clear_hold_s.label: Fault clear delay
fault_clear_hold_s.help: A fault condition must stay gone this long before the fault clears.

frost_enabled.label: Frost protection
frost_enabled.help: Circulate water when the outside air gets close to freezing (not in winter mode).

frost_threshold.label: Frost threshold
frost_threshold.help: Air temperature at or below which frost protection activates.

frost_run_s.label: Frost run duration
frost_run_s.help: Length of each frost-protection circulation run.

frost_interval_s.label: Frost interval
frost_interval_s.help: Time between frost-protection runs while it stays cold.

water_min.label: Water: plausible minimum
water_min.help: Readings below this are treated as sensor errors.

water_max.label: Water: plausible maximum
water_max.help: Readings above this are treated as sensor errors.

mat_min.label: Mat: plausible minimum
mat_min.help: Readings below this are treated as sensor errors.

mat_max.label: Mat: plausible maximum
mat_max.help: Readings above this are treated as sensor errors.

air_min.label: Air: plausible minimum
air_min.help: Readings below this are treated as sensor errors.

air_max.label: Air: plausible maximum
air_max.help: Readings above this are treated as sensor errors.

roc_water.label: Water: max change/tick
roc_water.help: Larger jumps within one tick are rejected as spikes.

roc_mat.label: Mat: max change/tick
roc_mat.help: Larger jumps within one tick are rejected as spikes.

roc_air.label: Air: max change/tick
roc_air.help: Larger jumps within one tick are rejected as spikes.

reset85_boot_s.label: 85 °C boot filter
reset85_boot_s.help: Exactly 85.0 °C within this time after boot is treated as the DS18B20 power-on value.

stuck_window_s.label: Stuck-sensor window
stuck_window_s.help: A probe that doesn't change within this window raises an advisory warning.

offset_water_a.label: Offset water A
offset_water_a.help: Calibration offset added to this probe.

offset_water_b.label: Offset water B
offset_water_b.help: Calibration offset added to this probe.

offset_mat_a.label: Offset mat A
offset_mat_a.help: Calibration offset added to this probe.

offset_mat_b.label: Offset mat B
offset_mat_b.help: Calibration offset added to this probe.

offset_air.label: Offset air
offset_air.help: Calibration offset added to this probe.

div_water.label: Water pair divergence
div_water.help: Above this difference the water pair counts as divergent.

div_mat.label: Mat pair divergence
div_mat.help: Above this difference the mat pair counts as divergent.

agg_water.label: Water aggregation
agg_water.help: How the two water probes combine into one value.

agg_mat.label: Mat aggregation
agg_mat.help: How the two mat probes combine into one value.

divpol_water.label: Water divergence policy
divpol_water.help: conservative picks the value that makes heating less likely.

divpol_mat.label: Mat divergence policy
divpol_mat.help: conservative picks the value that makes heating less likely.

tick_s.label: Control loop interval
tick_s.help: How often the controller evaluates sensors and decides.

boot_settle_s.label: Boot settle time
boot_settle_s.help: No decisions until sensors deliver real values after boot.

boot_policy.label: Boot behavior
boot_policy.help: resume restores the last mode; always_auto/always_off force a fixed mode after power-up.

force_timeout_s.label: Default manual-run timeout
force_timeout_s.help: Manual runs always end automatically after this time.

boost_timeout_s.label: Boost timeout
boost_timeout_s.help: Boost mode ends automatically after this time (0 = no timeout).

sample_enabled.label: Sampling runs
sample_enabled.help: For pipe-mounted water sensors: periodically circulate before trusting the reading. Not needed when the probe hangs in the pool.

sensors.title: Sensors
sensors.mapping_hint: Map each role to the Shelly Add-On temperature component (temperature:100…104). Set −1 for unmapped.

history.title: History
history.no_data: No data for this range yet

system.title: System
system.restore_confirm: Restore this backup? Current settings will be overwritten.
system.totp_scan: Add this secret to your authenticator app, then confirm with a code:
